resources.string: Shows your active focus session and time remaining on the home screen.

FocusFlow uses this service to enforce your focus sessions by detecting which app you open. When you start a focus session, any app not on your allowed list is immediately redirected back to the home screen.

 This service reads only the package name of the active window — it cannot read your messages, passwords, screen content, or any personal information. All processing happens entirely on your device. No data is ever collected or transmitted.

 The service is only active when you have an active focus session or block schedule running. You can disable it at any time from Accessibility Settings.
